description: Keystone is an open-source Node.js headless CMS and application framework for defining data schemas and generating an admin UI and GraphQL API. Developers run Keystone in their own infrastructure rather than integrating with a vendor-hosted service on keystonejs.com.
summary: KeystoneJS exposes a self-hosted GraphQL API at a configurable `/api/graphql` path and a public `keystone` CLI for developing, building, and running projects; no public hosted API, MCP server, or standalone REST API docs were found on keystonejs.com.
